error_signature: Webhook call received but event not caught
title: Shopify Trigger not catching events
symptom: When sending a POST request to the Shopify Trigger webhook URL, the event is not caught despite receiving a success message.
applies_when: Sending POST requests to the webhook URL
not_this_if: Webhook call is not returning a success message
root_cause: The Shopify Trigger in n8n requires specific HTTP headers and a correctly computed HMAC-SHA256 value for the request to be processed. If these are not set correctly, the event will not be caught even if the webhook call is acknowledged.
fix_steps: Ensure you are sending the correct HTTP headers as per the Shopify Trigger implementation.
Set the client secret value from your Shopify Dev Dashboard.
Compute the HMAC-SHA256 value using your Shopify App client secret.
Remove any newlines and unnecessary whitespaces from your JSON payload.
agent_instruction: Check and update your HTTP headers, client secret, and HMAC-SHA256 value before sending the request.
